    feat(scope): ...      fix(scope): ...      docs: ...
    refactor: ...         test: ...            chore(ci): ...
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. Focus on the why, not the file list. -->

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-facing capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal restructure, no behaviour change
- [ ] perf — measurable performance change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — build, CI, deps, tooling

## How I tested

<!--
  Commands you ran and what you saw. Be specific.
  Example:
    - `make lint && make typecheck && make test`
    - Manual: ran `make up`, logged in, created a new agent,
      verified the chat composer lists the configured model.
-->

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] Manually exercised the changed surface (steps above)
